\definecolor{wgBlue}{HTML}{2E6FB0}\definecolor{wgBlueBg}{HTML}{E8F1FB}% secondary / infrastructure / control
\definecolor{wgAmber}{HTML}{C9821F}\definecolor{wgAmberBg}{HTML}{FBEEDB}% attention / the costly thing
\definecolor{wgSlate}{HTML}{6E767E}\definecolor{wgSlateBg}{HTML}{EEF1F3}% neutral / pipeline / outputs
\definecolor{wgGreen}{HTML}{2E8B57}\definecolor{wgGreenBg}{HTML}{E9F4EC}% good / health / ideal
\definecolor{wgRed}{HTML}{C4313C}\definecolor{wgRedBg}{HTML}{FBE9EA}% problem / drift / failure
\definecolor{wgPurple}{HTML}{6A51A3}\definecolor{wgPurpleBg}{HTML}{ECE8F4}% alternative method / 4th category
\definecolor{wgPink}{HTML}{CC79A7}\definecolor{wgPinkBg}{HTML}{F7EAF1}% alternative method / penalty region

%% --- extras ---
